expected_harm.target_text: Significantly reduce all forms of violence and related death rates everywhere

safe_haven_density.target_text: Provide universal access to safe, inclusive and accessible, green and public spaces

evacuation_coverage.target_text: Implement integrated policies and plans towards inclusion, resource efficiency, disaster risk reduction

traffic_accidents.target_text: Halve the number of global deaths and injuries from road traffic accidents

crime_property.target_text: Significantly reduce illicit financial and arms flows, combat all forms of organized crime

heat_days.target_text: Strengthen resilience and adaptive capacity to climate-related hazards

flood_risk.target_text: Reduce deaths and economic losses from disasters

earthquake_exposure.target_text: Reduce adverse effects of natural disasters

source: UN Department of Economic and Social Affairs - SDG Indicators Database
